creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Shane from comment #1)

Your patch does not apply:

--------------------------
|diff -Nru graphics/blender.orig/Makefile graphics/blender/Makefile
|--- graphics/blender.orig/Makefile     2024-11-27 13:16:15.806475000 +1030
|+++ graphics/blender/Makefile  2024-11-27 09:18:55.919388000 +1030
--------------------------
Patching file graphics/blender/Makefile using Plan A...
Hunk #1 failed at 1.
Hunk #2 succeeded at 28.
Hunk #3 succeeded at 46.
1 out of 3 hunks failed--saving rejects to graphics/blender/Makefile.rej

Ideally, produce a patch by committing your update on top of the ports tree and then using "git format-patch" to create a patch file.  This makes it possible to use a three-way merge should it not apply.
